holdings.infoBox: FTQI is an equity ETF with a total of 182 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 7.70%, US Dollar at 6.02%, NVIDIA at 5.59%, Advanced Micro Devices at 5.04%, and Amazon.com at 3.84%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq BuyWrite Income ETF (FTQI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of US stocks, with an options overlay of short calls on the Nasdaq 100. FTQI was launched on Jan 6, 2014 and is issued by First Trust.
